2074.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Masud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "All people will pass over Hell, then they will be saved or destroyed based on their deeds."
2074.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Masud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Semua orang akan melewati neraka, kemudian mereka akan selamat atau binasa berdasarkan amal perbuatan mereka."

2075.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ said that Death will be brought on the Day of Resurrection in the form of a horned ram and slaughtered between Paradise and Hell. It will be called out: 'O people of Paradise, eternity with no death! O people of Hell, eternity with no death!'
2075.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ bersabda bahwa Kematian akan dibawa pada hari Kiamat dalam bentuk seekor domba jantan bertanduk dan disembelih antara surga dan neraka. Kemudian diserukan: 'Wahai penghuni surga, keabadian tanpa kematian! Wahai penghuni neraka, keabadian tanpa kematian!'

2076.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ☯ give a sermon repeating: 'I warn you of the Fire, I warn you of the Fire, I warn you of the Fire' — until it was as if he were seeing it with his own eyes.
2076.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari a companion (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dia mendengar Rasulullah ☯ berkhutbah dengan berulang kali menyampaikan: 'Aku memperingatkan kalian tentang neraka, aku memperingatkan kalian tentang neraka, aku memperingatkan kalian tentang neraka' — hingga seolah-olah beliau melihatnya dengan mata kepalanya sendiri.

2077.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man said: When I die, burn me until I become charcoal, then grind me and scatter me in the wind. His family did so. By the Lord of Muhammad, Allah gathered his scattered remains and asked: 'Why did you do this?' He said: 'From fear of You, O Lord.' So Allah forgave him.
2077.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata: Ketika aku mati, bakarlah aku hingga menjadi arang, kemudian giling aku dan sebarkan ke angin. Keluarganya melakukan itu. Demi Rabb Muhammad, Allah mengumpulkan kembali sisa-sisanya dan bertanya: 'Mengapa engkau melakukan ini?' Dia menjawab: 'Karena takut kepada-Mu, ya Rabb.' Maka Allah mengampuninya.

2078.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "A woman entered Hellfire because of a cat she imprisoned, neither feeding it nor letting it free to find food from the earth, until it died of hunger."
2078.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Seorang wanita masuk neraka karena seekor kucing yang dia kurung; dia tidak memberinya makan dan tidak melepaskannya untuk mencari makan dari bumi, hingga kucing itu mati kelaparan."

2079.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "Death will be brought forward on the Day of Resurrection in the form of a horned ram, slaughtered between Paradise and Hell. It will be announced: 'O people of Paradise, eternity with no death! O people of Hell, eternity with no death!'"
2079.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Kematian akan dibawa ke hadapan pada hari Kiamat dalam bentuk seekor domba jantan bertanduk, disembelih antara surga dan neraka. Kemudian diumumkan: 'Wahai penghuni surga, keabadian tanpa kematian! Wahai penghuni neraka, keabadian tanpa kematian!'"

2080.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ said: 'In Hell there is a valley called Habhab inhabited by every arrogant tyrant — so beware of becoming one of them.'
2080.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari a companion (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ bersabda: 'Di dalam neraka terdapat sebuah lembah yang disebut Habhab yang dihuni oleh setiap orang yang sombong dan zalim — maka berhati-hatilah agar tidak menjadi salah satu dari mereka.'

2081.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ said that sinful believers will be burned in the Fire until they become like charcoal, then intercession will be permitted and they will be brought out in groups and scattered over the rivers of Paradise, and they will grow like seeds in flood water.
2081.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ bersabda bahwa orang-orang mukmin yang berdosa akan dibakar di dalam neraka hingga menjadi seperti arang, kemudian izin syafaat diberikan dan mereka dikeluarkan berkelompok-kelompok dan disebarkan di sungai-sungai surga, dan mereka akan tumbuh seperti biji-bijian di air bah.

2082.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Masud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "Paradise has eight gates."
2082.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Masud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Surga memiliki delapan pintu."

2083.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "Whoever enters Paradise will be in bliss, never suffering: his garments will not wear out and his youth will not fade. In Paradise there will be what no eye has seen, no ear has heard, and what has never occurred to any human heart."
2083.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang masuk surga, dia akan berada dalam kenikmatan tanpa penderitaan: pakaiannya tidak akan usang dan masa mudanya tidak akan memudar. Di surga terdapat apa yang tidak pernah dilihat mata, tidak pernah didengar telinga, dan tidak pernah terbetik dalam hati manusia."

2084.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "A space in Paradise the size of a whip is better than this world and everything in it."
2084.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Ruang di surga seluas cambuk lebih baik daripada dunia ini dan segala isinya."

2085.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that they asked: 'What is Paradise built of?' He said: 'One brick of gold and one brick of silver; its mortar is fragrant musk; its pebbles are pearls and rubies; its soil is saffron. Whoever enters it will be in bliss and not in misery, living forever and not dying, his garments not wearing out, his youth not fading.'
2085.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mereka bertanya: 'Apakah bangunan surga itu?' Beliau menjawab: 'Satu bata emas dan satu bata perak; mortarnya adalah misk yang wangi; kerikil-kerikil di dalamnya adalah mutiara dan permata merah; tanahnya adalah kunyit. Barangsiapa yang masuk ke dalamnya akan berada dalam kenikmatan dan bukan kesengsaraan, hidup selamanya dan tidak mati, pakaiannya tidak usang, masa mudanya tidak memudar.'

2086.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ said: 'The people of the two Gardens — their vessels, their clothing, and everything in them is magnificent. The only barrier between them and the sight of their Lord will be the mantle of His greatness over His face in the Gardens of Eden, and the rivers flow from beneath the Throne.'
2086.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ bersabda: 'Penghuni kedua taman — bejana-bejana mereka, pakaian-pakaian mereka, dan segala sesuatu di dalamnya sungguh indah. Satu-satunya penghalang antara mereka dan penglihatan terhadap Rabb mereka hanyalah selendang keagungan di wajah-Nya di taman-taman Eden, dan sungai-sungai mengalir dari bawah Arsy.'

2087.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ spoke of seventy thousand who would enter Paradise without reckoning. Ukkasha stood and asked him to pray that Allah make him one of them — and he prayed. Then another man stood and asked, and the Prophet ☯ said: 'Ukkasha has beaten you to it.'
2087.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ berbicara tentang tujuh puluh ribu yang akan masuk surga tanpa hisab. Ukkasyah berdiri dan memintanya berdoa agar Allah menjadikannya salah satu dari mereka — dan beliau mendoakannya. Kemudian seorang laki-laki lain berdiri dan meminta, lalu Nabi ☯ berkata: 'Ukkasyah telah mendahuluimu.'

2088.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "It will be called out to the people of Paradise: 'Be healthy and never be ill; be in bliss and never be sorrowful; live and never die; be young and never grow old.' This is the word of Allah: This is Paradise which you have been made to inherit for what you used to do."
2088.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Akan dikumandangkan kepada penghuni surga: 'Jadilah sehat dan jangan pernah sakit; bersenang-senanglah dan jangan pernah bersedih; hiduplah dan jangan pernah mati; jadilah muda dan jangan pernah tua.' Inilah firman Allah: Inilah surga yang diwariskan kepada kalian disebabkan apa yang dahulu kalian kerjakan."

2089.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "A man of Paradise will be given the strength of one hundred men in eating, drinking, and intercourse. A Jewish man objected: 'But one who eats must relieve himself?' He said: 'His sweat will exude like musk, and his stomach will shrink.'"
2089.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Seorang penghuni surga akan diberi kekuatan seratus orang dalam hal makan, minum, dan bersetubuh. Seorang laki-laki Yahudi keberatan: 'Tapi orang yang makan tentu perlu membuang hajat?' Beliau menjawab: 'Keringatnya akan memancar seperti misk, dan perutnya akan mengecil.'"

2090.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "The people of Paradise will be young, beardless, smooth-skinned, with kohl-lined eyes. Their garments will not wear out and their youth will not fade."
2090.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Penghuni surga akan menjadi muda, tanpa jenggot, kulitnya halus, dengan mata bercelak. Pakaian mereka tidak akan usang dan masa muda mereka tidak akan memudar."

2091.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ said: 'The people of Paradise will not urinate, blow their noses, or defecate. Their food will become belching and perspiration like musk. They will be inspired to declare the glory and praise of Allah as naturally as they breathe.'
2091.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ bersabda: 'Penghuni surga tidak akan kencing, tidak membuang ingus, dan tidak buang air besar. Makanan mereka akan menjadi sendawa dan keringat seperti misk. Mereka akan terinspirasi bertasbih dan memuji Allah senatural mereka bernapas.'

2092.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ narrated from his Lord: 'I have prepared for My righteous servants what no eye has seen, no ear has heard, and what has not occurred to any human heart.' Read if you wish: 'No soul knows what has been hidden for them of comfort for eyes.' (al-Sajdah: 17).
2092.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ meriwayatkan dari Rabb-nya: 'Aku telah mempersiapkan untuk hamba-hamba-Ku yang saleh apa yang tidak pernah dilihat mata, tidak pernah didengar telinga, dan tidak pernah terbetik dalam hati manusia.' Bacalah jika mau: 'Tidak ada jiwa yang mengetahui apa yang disembunyikan untuk mereka berupa kenyamanan bagi mata.' (al-Sajdah: 17).

2093.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ described the man of lowest rank in Paradise: he will be given what equals the world ten times over, and it will be said to him: 'That is for you, and its equal with it.'
2093.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ menggambarkan penghuni surga yang paling rendah derajatnya: dia akan diberi apa yang setara dengan dunia sepuluh kali lipat, dan dikatakan kepadanya: 'Itu untukmu, dan yang setara dengannya bersamanya.'

2094.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ described the highest rank in Paradise as shining like a brilliant planet in the sky, and Abu Sa'id clarified this meant a star shining from afar.
2094.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ menggambarkan penghuni surga yang tertinggi derajatnya bersinar seperti planet yang cemerlang di langit, dan Abu Sa'id memperjelas bahwa ini seperti bintang yang bersinar dari kejauhan.

2095.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "Every person in Paradise will have two wives whose marrow of their legs is visible through the skin because of their beauty, and there will be no dispute between them."
2095.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Setiap orang di surga akan memiliki dua istri yang sumsum betisnya terlihat dari luar kulitnya karena kecantikannya, dan tidak akan ada perselisihan di antara mereka."

2096.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Musa al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "The tent in Paradise is a hollowed-out pearl sixty miles wide; in each corner there will be a wife who cannot be seen by the others, and the believer will visit them all."
2096.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Musa al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Kemah di surga adalah mutiara berongga selebar enam puluh mil; di setiap sudutnya akan ada seorang istri yang tidak bisa dilihat oleh yang lain, dan orang mukmin akan mengunjungi mereka semua."

2097.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "If a believer desires a child in Paradise, its pregnancy, delivery, and growth will occur in the time he wishes."
2097.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Jika seorang mukmin menginginkan anak di surga, kehamilan, persalinan, dan pertumbuhannya akan terjadi dalam waktu yang dia inginkan."

2098.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraidah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "The people of Paradise will be one hundred and twenty rows, eighty of which will be from this community and forty from all the other nations."
2098.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraidah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Penghuni surga akan berjumlah seratus dua puluh barisan, delapan puluh di antaranya dari umat ini dan empat puluh dari seluruh umat yang lain."

2099.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ka'b ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: 'In Paradise there is a sea of milk, a sea of honey, and a sea of wine, and rivers will branch off from them.'
2099.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ka'b ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: 'Di surga terdapat lautan susu, lautan madu, dan lautan khamar, dan sungai-sungai akan bercabang dari ketiganya.'

2100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the verse of al-Kawthar was revealed, the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: 'It is a river in Paradise, its banks are of gold, its bed is of rubies and pearls, its water is whiter than milk and sweeter than honey.'
2100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika ayat al-Kautsar diturunkan, Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: 'Itu adalah sebuah sungai di surga, tepiannya dari emas, dasarnya dari permata merah dan mutiara, airnya lebih putih dari susu dan lebih manis dari madu.'

2101.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "In Paradise there is a tree in whose shade a rider could travel for one hundred years without crossing it."
2101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Di surga terdapat sebuah pohon yang dalam naungannya seorang pengendara bisa berjalan selama seratus tahun tanpa bisa menyeberanginya."

2102.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "In Paradise there is a tree in whose shade a rider could travel for one hundred years without crossing it — and it is the Tuba tree."
2102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Di surga terdapat sebuah pohon yang dalam naungannya seorang pengendara bisa berjalan selama seratus tahun tanpa bisa menyeberanginya — dan itulah pohon Tuba."

2103.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "The ajwah dates are from Paradise, and they are a cure for poison."
2103.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Kurma ajwah berasal dari surga, dan ia adalah obat penawar racun."

2104.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "In Paradise there is a market. The people will go to it, a wind will blow the fragrance of Paradise upon them, and they will return to their families more handsome and more beautiful."
2104.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Di surga terdapat sebuah pasar. Orang-orang akan mendatanginya, angin akan meniupkan aroma surga kepada mereka, dan mereka akan kembali kepada keluarganya dalam keadaan lebih tampan dan lebih cantik."

2105.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "Paradise is surrounded by hardships and Hell is surrounded by desires."
2105.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Surga dikelilingi oleh hal-hal yang tidak disukai dan neraka dikelilingi oleh syahwat."

2106.iwh_en: It was narrated from a companion (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ said: 'Give glad tidings to the poor emigrants of what will delight their faces, for they will enter Paradise half a day before the wealthy — and that half day equals five hundred years.'
2106.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari a companion (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ bersabda: 'Sampaikanlah kabar gembira kepada kaum Muhajirin yang miskin tentang apa yang akan menyenangkan wajah-wajah mereka, karena mereka akan masuk surga setengah hari sebelum orang-orang kaya — dan setengah hari itu setara dengan lima ratus tahun.'

2107.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "The Fire complained to its Lord saying: 'Parts of me are consuming one another.' So Allah permitted it two exhalations: one in winter and one in summer. The intense cold you feel is from the cold of Hell, and the intense heat is from its heat."
2107.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Neraka mengadu kepada Rabb-nya: 'Sebagian dariku memakan sebagian yang lain.' Maka Allah mengizinkannya dua hembusan napas: satu di musim dingin dan satu di musim panas. Dingin yang sangat terasa adalah dari dinginnya neraka, dan panas yang sangat terasa adalah dari panasnya."

2108.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "Your fire is one part out of seventy parts of Hellfire. Each of those seventy parts has the same heat as your fire."
2108.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Api kalian adalah satu bagian dari tujuh puluh bagian api neraka Jahannam. Setiap bagian dari tujuh puluh itu memiliki panas yang sama dengan api kalian."

2109.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ☯ said: 'The person with the lightest punishment in Hell is one who has sandals, and his brain will boil from them.'
2109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ☯ bersabda: 'Orang yang paling ringan siksaannya di neraka adalah orang yang memiliki sandal, dan otaknya akan mendidih karenanya.'

2110.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ☯ said: "Hell will be filled with its people and will keep saying 'Is there more? Is there more?' three times, until Allah puts His foot upon it and it says 'Enough, enough, enough!'"
2110.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ☯ bersabda: "Neraka akan dipenuhi dengan penghuninya dan terus berkata 'Apakah masih ada lagi? Apakah masih ada lagi?' tiga kali, hingga Allah meletakkan kaki-Nya di atasnya dan ia berkata 'Cukup, cukup, cukup!'"
